title: Fabric Fun
description: All of Your Essential Mods for Fabric!
body:

# **Fabric Fun**

Fabric Fun is a comprehensive modpack designed for the Fabric platform, featuring a carefully selected collection of essential mods. Whether you are new to modding or an experienced player, this pack ensures a seamless and enjoyable Minecraft experience with improved performance, enhanced gameplay features, and quality-of-life improvements. Explore new possibilities and take your game to the next level, all while enjoying the stability and flexibility that Fabric mods are known for.

# **Mod List**

- Fabric API
- Sodium
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- Reese's Sodium Options
- OptiGUI
- Iris Sharders
- Entity Texture Features (ETF)
- AppleSkin
- Cloth Config API
- Elytra Trims
